rulings.Case Title: PAUL WILEY, TRUSTEE OF THE WILEY FAMILY TRUST VS. ADAM BRISTOL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Dismissal Filed December 16, 2014
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 20, 2015 line 3. DEFENDANTS ADAM BRISTOL, INDRE VISKONTAS and JOSEPH BURKE's Motion To Vacate Dismissal Filed December 16, 2014 GRANTED. Parties are to meet and confer regarding the form of judgment and present the judgment to the Court at the hearing. If parties are unable to agree on the form of judgment, CRC 3.1312 shall be followed. = (501/REQ)
